\vspace{0.3cm}

\noindent
\textbf{Data scientist and policy analyst with an MSc in Geophysical Data Science and a first-author publication in the \textit{Journal of Glaciology}. Applies rigorous quantitative methods and data storytelling to public sector equity analysis, longitudinal behavioral research, and program evaluation. Translates complex statistical outputs into accessible reports for government and community audiences. Proficient in Python, SQL, R, statistical modeling, and geospatial analysis.}

% =========================
\section*{Technical Skills}

\noindent
\textbf{Statistical Methods \& Research:} OLS regression, ANOVA (two-way, factorial), ARIMAX time-series modeling, STL decomposition, Monte Carlo simulation, uncertainty quantification, cross-validation, SHAP attribution, mixed-methods program evaluation, research design

\noindent
\textbf{Data Analysis \& Visualization:} Python (pandas, NumPy, matplotlib, statsmodels, Flask, Folium), SQL/SQLite, R (familiar), Jupyter, GitHub, interactive maps and dashboards, data quality pipelines

\noindent
\textbf{Demographic \& Spatial Data:} ACS/Census API pipelines, GTFS transit data, geopandas, osmnx, Google Earth Engine, GDAL, Sentinel-2 remote sensing

\noindent
\textbf{Operational:} REST APIs, systemd services, Raspberry Pi deployment, Excel (pivot tables, XLOOKUP, VBA macros), Tailscale VPN

% =========================
\section*{Selected Projects}

\noindent
\textbf{snotrac --- Transit Equity Analysis for Snohomish County} \hfill Python, geopandas, osmnx
\begin{itemize}
    \item Frequency-weighted accessibility model combining GTFS network data, ACS demographic layers, and OSM road networks; pandana gravity model with $\beta$=4.0 decay at 0.25 mi walking tolerance.
    \item Vulnerability Index: 4 ACS indicators (elderly \%, unemployment, zero-vehicle HH, poverty); Gap Score = vuln $\times$ (1 -- log\_accessibility); equity distance as signed perpendicular from diagonal.
    \item Produced interactive county maps (Folium), equity scatter plots, 2D priority rankings; policy brief delivered to regional agencies and county planning staff.
\end{itemize}

\vspace{0.2cm}
\noindent
\textbf{dada\_science --- Longitudinal Behavioral Analysis} \hfill Python, statsmodels, Flask, SQLite
\begin{itemize}
    \item STL decomposition and ARIMAX modeling on 130-day longitudinal time series; two-way ANOVA on behavioral outcome data identified time-of-day as explaining 76.9\% of variance, isolating intervention-relevant factors.
    \item Production data collection platform: Flask + 7-table SQLite schema; mobile-first UI; systemd service; 7 behavioral categories tracked continuously, enabling rolling trend and anomaly detection.
    \item Analysis methods directly parallel behavioral health program evaluation: identify confounders, isolate factor effects, communicate actionable findings.
\end{itemize}

\vspace{0.2cm}
\noindent
\textbf{statistical\_uniqueness --- Demographic Re-identification Risk Engine} \hfill Python, Flask, Census API
\begin{itemize}
    \item Joint-probability engine computing how many US residents share a complete demographic profile; implements the same math used in enterprise privacy engineering and public-sector data stewardship review.
    \item 3 conditional lookup tables decorrelating correlated demographic attributes; race-stratified education matrix (8 race $\times$ 7 education groups); state sweep across all 52 US states with disk-cached Census API lookups.
    \item Informs responsible data use decisions: who can be re-identified from a published dataset, which attributes carry the most identifying weight, how to assess disclosure risk in public data releases.
\end{itemize}

\vspace{0.2cm}
\noindent
\textbf{glacier\_prethicktor --- Published ML (Journal of Glaciology, 2026)} \hfill TensorFlow/Keras, Python
\begin{itemize}
    \item First-author, peer-reviewed publication: shallow neural network trained on surface attributes from 216,501 glaciers; 273 leave-one-out cross-validation models; 3-component uncertainty quantification.
    \item Global ice volume 136 $\pm$ 2 $\times$ 10$^3$ km$^3$; residual $-3 \pm 28$ m vs. Farinotti et al. consensus benchmark.
\end{itemize}
